title: Improved Tableau Connection Error Modal with Troubleshooting Link
story: As a product administrator experiencing a Tableau connection error, I want to see a clear error message with troubleshooting steps, so that I can resolve the issue without contacting support.
description:
Replaces the generic Tableau connection error with a user-friendly modal that provides specific guidance. The error modal reads:

"There was an error connecting to Tableau server. Please check to ensure your token matches. More details and troubleshooting steps are available on our Tableau Pulse integration tutorial."

The modal includes a link to the Tableau Pulse integration tutorial on datatoolspro.com for detailed troubleshooting steps.
acceptance_criteria: Tableau connection errors display in a modal instead of a generic alert
Error message clearly states the issue and suggests checking the token
Link to the Tableau Pulse integration tutorial is included and opens in a new tab
Modal is dismissible and allows the user to retry
ux_changes: Replaced generic Tableau error alert with a styled modal containing a clear error message and a link to the troubleshooting tutorial.
implementation_notes: Error handling improved to catch Tableau API connection failures and display a helpful modal instead of a raw error.
comment_summary: Waqar updated the error handling on development.
